tools.name: arb_overview
tools.description: Comprehensive Arbitrum ecosystem overview: ARB price, TVL, protocol count, chain status

tools.name: arb_token_risk
tools.description: Risk score for any Arbitrum token by contract address. Checks verification, proxy status, activity.

tools.name: arb_protocol_health
tools.description: DeFi protocol health check: TVL, audit status, risk score. Supports GMX, Aave, Pendle, Camelot, etc.

tools.name: arb_gas_tracker
tools.description: Current Arbitrum gas prices with USD cost estimates for transfers and swaps

tools.name: arb_whale_watch
tools.description: Monitor large transactions for any Arbitrum address. Tracks whale movements.

tools.name: arb_contract_check
tools.description: Smart contract risk analysis: verification, proxy, compiler, license

tools.name: arb_defi_yields
tools.description: Compare DeFi yields across all Arbitrum protocols. Filter by TVL and category.

tools.name: arb_protocol_list
tools.description: List all major DeFi protocols on Arbitrum ranked by TVL

tools.name: arb_stablecoin_risk
tools.description: Stablecoin supply and risk analysis on Arbitrum (USDC, USDT, DAI, etc.)

tools.name: arb_bridge_flows
tools.description: Bridge deposit/withdrawal flow monitoring for Arbitrum

tools.name: arb_token_screening
tools.description: Compliance screening for Arbitrum tokens: verification, risk flags, basic AML check

tools.name: arb_liquidity_scan
tools.description: DEX liquidity and volume analysis across Arbitrum exchanges
